name: The Meek Shall Inherit The Earth
description: MEEK (THEMEEKSHALLINHERITTHEEARTH) is a community-driven token on the Solana blockchain built around the philosophical concept that collective action can create opportunities for wealth building among everyday people. The project positions itself as a movement rather than a traditional cryptocurrency, emphasizing community ownership and participation over speculative trading. The name references the biblical phrase "the meek shall inherit the earth," reframed as a statement about economic empowerment for those historically excluded from traditional wealth-building mechanisms. The project maintains active social channels and a dedicated community of holders who participate in governance discussions and content creation.
